purpose: Materialize target-language semantic translations from current-run source extraction when no pre-supplied translation JSON exists.
system_prompt: Translate extracted PDF text units into the requested target language. Preserve unit identity. Do not use reference PDFs, fixed page branches, fixed text mappings, or sample-specific corrections.
user_prompt_template: Translate run {{run_id}} from {{source_language}} to {{target_language}} using current-run extracted source units {{source_structure}}. Return one target text per unit_id with full semantic coverage.
anti_overfit_policy: The translator may consume only current-run extracted text. Human reference PDFs and known paired translations are forbidden runtime evidence.
